Why Snow Travels

We don't just show
the lights. We hunt them.

97.54%
Aurora success rate
Verified over 3 full seasons. We chase clear skies wherever they are — across fjords, mountains, even into Finland.
5–9h
No time limits
We stay out as long as it takes. If the lights appear at 2am, we're still there. No clock-watching, no rush.
Free
Professional photos
High-resolution aurora shots taken by your guide. Sent to you the morning after. Always free, no exceptions.
0 kr
Free rebooking
If the lights don't appear, we rebook you for free on your next available evening. Zero risk, zero stress.
